title: mnemion agreste
side_effects: Mnemion agreste can have side effects if used improperly, such as hallucinations, memory loss, and increased heart rate. In severe cases, excessive consumption can lead to seizures, coma, and even long-term brain damage. Additionally, improper use may also cause digestive issues, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, in some individuals. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the Mnemion agreste plant for any health benefits.
